title: Ben's Christmas Mod
description: Festive / winter holiday food, lights and decorations
body:
![Ben's Christmas Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096b7c6783aa151f790e1e579e252a68f4263f29.png)
# About A simple mod that adds Christmas themed decorations, food, and items. Fabric 1.20.1
****

![Stockings title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2492c5b0067432d26e463994db166b39889f07cc.png)
Can be placed as a decorative block and available in every dye colour ![Screenshot of all the stocking colour vairants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Um8yLrY7/images/9487e49619a2d3592951a12eee89dee8a82044b5.png) ![All colours of the Stocking item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1f12a56f9346d8230fc6d75d7358dccc3207add.png)
Crafting Recipe ![Red Stocking crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52584a0c298f9fde698f9c337bb3a2821d3c3b2.png)
![String lights title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/284ab9204f96ff0988aa2bca22fcfc1e171b8728.png)
Can be placed on the side of blocks, gives off a light level of 4, and available in every dye colour ![Screenshot of all the colour variants of String Lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Um8yLrY7/images/b223f2fa44c60a6fb15425673c0d0a9075113231.gif) ![All colours of the String Light item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/597aeda964a265d6d1c9256be74ea666ff4f9554.png)
Crafting Recipe Rainbow String Lights: ![Rainbow String Lights crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5bc0957e5811ea47bb543c6ddce7d3a246323f2.png)
Single coloured string lights:

![Yellow String Lights crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/718a4d3b559bee7a9765d417aa2bf67fcdc2ed78.png)
![Gingerbread Man title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/064cd0d0f31d775e5324cd39511f8ca0b390f4b1.png)
Raw Gingerbread Man gives the cooked version when smelted ![Raw Gingerbread Man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c457ab14d4145d27a28c91a94b76ebe7295a0e5.png) Gingerbread Man gives you 4 hunger points when eaten ![Gingerbread Man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebbc570dd5c58a8bf2e6060b6ad95d6c2072a9e7.png)
Crafting Recipe Raw Gingerbread Man: ![Raw Gingerbread Man crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b23d85e6924dbed44195192cd6db8b2221766c22.png)
Gingerbread Man:

![Gingerbread Man smelting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2de9ecba5d5d30abdb8f70bcf25ea483c11575cf.png)
![Candy Cane title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/220e3a86aaf6cab9e8d41f401d3342ee8ed8f7c5.png)
Gives 4 hunger points when eaten ![Candy Cane item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb432eee7ddb07ed04af9ae8929ce8bb5e387727.png) Or can be crafted into a building block. ![Candy Cane Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fc09ce27e9eee4d20bf6382d8d0bdc225f975af.png)
Crafting Recipes ![Candy Cane crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81184d3aee13bbe310f8a974ba54dbe200be3fe.png) ![Candy Cane Block crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d9ce7736ec4d80dda72a529a0cea1b8689cd72.png)
![Pavlova title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b74bc5ad28019a0b3523a05bf9a4b2fffa1bf314.png)
A sweet meringue-based dessert popular in New Zealand and Australia. ![Pavlova block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f11d77db06fef8faaa1bdeef271861009ffe4b8.png) The block can be eaten in slices just like a regular Minecraft cake.
Crafting Recipe ![Pavlova crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add41aeaa830952259f754a6807d4f805ee47695.png)
![Garland title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/521153d1f836877dd11dec6f5d8d21f3c9dfa75f.png)
A decorative leaf thing you can place on the side of blocks ![Garland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d32fdea689e3823bf04c4129ae2bfdb60c9dbf6.png) ![Garland Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c95ee9db4e4049d124196c843df03afd640c84c0.png)
Crafting Recipe ![Garland crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efc7ae76bc13f4c0974552808f27d94347dcc5c0.png) ![Garland Bow crafting recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07b4659621222ee6f104b33a85a15ce5c4f39115.png)
**** # About This is my first ever mod and is really just meant to be a fun art project, so there may be some bugs. However, the mod is so simple (just adding decorative blocks and items) that its extremely unlikely anything will go wrong with it. You can find the source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/BennyMcCarthy/benschristmasmod) Join the Discord server to leave Feedback, ask Questions and get notified for Updates and teasers
https://discord.gg/4eVDHSw4cJ **DO NOT DISTRIBUTE**
